title: erigeron eatonii var. eatonii
intro: Erigeron eatonii var. eatonii, also known as Eaton's Fleabane, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Erigeron eatonii var. eatonii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and fever, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Erigeron eatonii var. eatonii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being and health.
